name: /pr-corpus-learn emits a summary record listing total promoted total skipped and total considered patterns
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '[]\n' > pr-corpus/patterns.json && printf '{"gate":"pass"}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-learn.sh" --patterns pr-corpus/patterns.json --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'considered=0' out.txt && grep -q 'promoted=0' out.txt && grep -q 'skipped=0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
